name: Thomas “Tommy” Bates | Best friend’s younger brother
description:
OC | “Did somebody say panty raid?” | (Panty Thief)

How hard could it be to steal a pair of underwear? Tommy’s done it before, plenty of times! How else is he supposed to get his fix? Too bad he’s about to get caught…

CW: Painty Raider, Mommy Kink

Oh yeah! Baby boy Tommy’s here. Sorry it took so long, I took a little break. I can’t tell if Leah or Tommy’s my favorite!

Now that this little mini series thing is wrapped up I’m going to be working on requests, so as always if you have any link is in my bio. Much love babes
